title: Ace’s Fate and the End of the War: Rising Conflict

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: I'll be better than you someday, ace!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: don't panic. They won't get any further.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #18
dialogue.text: That'll make things more interesting later.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: What unit is this traitor in!!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #20
dialogue.text: Do you want to die here!!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Take ace and get out of here!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #21
dialogue.text: Hey, get these hand- cuffs off, quick!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Uwoooh!!! Why did the ship stop!!?
